headline: NVIDIA’s Sovereign AI Deals And Meta Alliance Shape Valuation Debate
summary: NVIDIA (NasdaqGS:NVDA) has agreed a multiyear partnership with Meta to deploy millions of Blackwell and Rubin GPUs and expand confidential computing for privacy focused AI. In India, the company is supporting one of Asia’s largest AI superclusters with Yotta Data Services and backing a sovereign AI venture under India's AI Mission. NVIDIA hardware powers India's first "Make in India" supercomputer and new sovereign and secure AI factories in Australia and Canada. Additional alliances include...

headline: This foreign energy stock is 'a great way to play the AI boom'
summary: Nvidia (NVDA) stock was trading lower on Friday despite the company's fourth quarter earnings beat, marking the stock's biggest drop in 10 months. Main Street Research chief investment officer James Demmert chats with Morning Brief host Julie Hyman to discuss ways to play the artificial intelligence (AI) trade outside of Nvidia, especially as the US dollar (DX-Y.NYB) weakens and foreign stocks become more attractive. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Morning Brief.

content.title: This foreign energy stock is 'a great way to play the AI boom'

Nvidia (NVDA) stock was trading lower on Friday despite the company's fourth quarter earnings beat, marking the stock's biggest drop in 10 months.

Main Street Research chief investment officer James Demmert chats with Morning Brief host Julie Hyman to discuss ways to play the artificial intelligence (AI) trade outside of Nvidia, especially as the US dollar (DX-Y.NYB) weakens and foreign stocks become more attractive.

To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Morning Brief.

headline: Exclusive-ASML plots future of chipmaking tools for AI beyond EUV
summary: ASML Holding has ambitious plans to expand its line of chipmaking equipment into several new products to capture more of the rapidly growing market for artificial intelligence chips, a senior executive told Reuters.  More than a decade in development, ASML is the only maker of extreme ‌ultraviolet, or EUV, equipment, which is crucial for Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co and Intel in manufacturing the world's most advanced AI chips.  ASML has poured billions of dollars into ‌developing the EUV systems, has a next-generation product nearing production and is researching a third potential generation.

content.title: Exclusive-ASML plots future of chipmaking tools for AI beyond EUV
content.summary: ASML Holding has ambitious plans to expand its line of chipmaking equipment into several new products to capture more of the rapidly growing market for artificial intelligence chips, a senior executive told Reuters.  More than a decade in development, ASML is the only maker of extreme ‌ultraviolet, or EUV, equipment, which is crucial for Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co and Intel in manufacturing the world's most advanced AI chips.  ASML has poured billions of dollars into ‌developing the EUV systems, has a next-generation product nearing production and is researching a third potential generation.

headline: doubleAI’s WarpSpeed Beats a Decade of Expert-Engineered GPU Kernels — Every Single One of Them
summary: TEL AVIV, Israel, March 02, 2026--doubleAI today announced WarpSpeed, the first Artificial Expert system to autonomously surpass world-class human experts in GPU performance engineering. WarpSpeed rewrote and re-optimized every kernel in NVIDIA’s cuGraph library — one of the most widely used GPU-accelerated graph analytics libraries in the world — delivering a 3.6x average speedup over a decade of expert-tuned code. The hyper-optimized library is now available on GitHub as a drop-in replacement

headline: Nvidia Stock Wavers Amid $2 Billion Optics Deal; Is Nvidia A Buy Or Sell Now?

Nvidia shares sought firm footing in a broader stock market grappling with the U.S. and Israel attacking Iran over the weekend following talks about Iran's nuclear ambitions.
